calendar.matters:
PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF DEATH
Off Calendar Jul-23-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Omar Krashna for Joshua Dennis.

Mr. Krashna confirmed that they still do not know if Archie Morton Dennis is deceased. The Petition to Establish Fact of Death was taken off calendar.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Harris.

PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF DEATH
Off Calendar Apr-23-2012 Continued To Jul-23-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Omar Krashna for Petitioner.

Mr. Krahsna explained the efforts made in searching for Mr. Dennis and requested one final continuance. The Court stated that it does not have enough information to grant the petition and continued it for one final time to July 23, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mr. Krahna is to file a report by July 13, 2012.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Clauzel.

PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF DEATH
Off Calendar Nov-07-2011 Continued To Dec-12-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Omar Krashna for Petitioner Joshua Dennis.

Counsel addressed the issues raised in the Examiner's notes with regard to if the Petitioner would be a person who would likely to have seen or heard from his father and notice to other heirs. The matter was continued to December 12, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Notice to Other Heirs and for further information.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy A. Whitehead.
